title: stenochlaena gracilis
intro: Stenochlaena gracilis, also known as the umbrella fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stenochlaena gracilis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in tea infusions or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
